item.title: Never judge a book by its coveralls
item.description: Video originally posted to TikTok by user @mudbug_a.m.r. Much longer video there. The title of this post is a comment made by user Elora Danan. This is at the Edmonton Public Library. They were working next to it. Piece is J. S. Bach prelude No.2 in C Minor BMV 847 (arranged by Luo Ni)

item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

item.title: FCC restores net neutrality, fulfilling yet another Biden promise.
item.description:
The Federal Communications Commission voted 3-2 along party lines on Thursday to restore net neutrality. The move fulfills a promise made by President Joe Biden in 2021 and effectively restores regulations put in place during the Obama administration. “In our post-pandemic world, we know that broadband is a necessity, not a luxury,” FCC Chairwoman Jessica Rosenworcel wrote. Net neutrality is the idea that internet service providers (ISPs) must give the same level of access to all data and websites. However, service providers are against net neutrality because they want the ability to charge for a higher tier of access or provide more bandwidth to sources they own. Without net neutrality, they were also allowed to block access to sites or to slow their data rates.
Under Traitor tRump, net neutrality rules were rapidly dismantled, with MAGAt Boot Licker FCC Chairman Ajit Pai celebrating the destruction. Pai was previously an attorney at Verizon and called concern over how ISPs would treat consumers’ “hysteria.” Pai resigned when Biden took office, but the damage he did remained until this week. https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2024/4/26/2237462/-FCC-restores-net-neutrality-fulfilling-a-Biden-promise

item.dc:creator: j0lt78

item.title: No pain no gain
item.description: I have been mostly sedentary for the last 10 years. And maybe more than 15 since I rode a bike. In the ancient times I was always walking everywhere and having a much more active lifestyle. But nowadays a (small) bit of walking and not much else. My body has been protesting for a while and since now I live quite close to a nice bike path, I finally convinced myself to buy a bike. It is exhilarating and so great to ride again! I am truly happy, and surprisingly I am able to ride for far longer than what I was expecting. But... Everything hurts. And I am not talking about the legs, mind you, that is tolerable. However the arms... the butt (can you still say butt in Imgur?). Where is my ibuprofen, thank you? Whatever, tomorrow another early morning ride awaits! Mandatory edit: thanks for all your encouraging words! Tomorrow I will definitely hit it again, early morning, while all is still calm around the neighborhood and the weather is cool. And I will check my settings, and have a look at gel seats, and of course take it SLOW, enjoying the ride (and the soreness). Much appreciated, fellow imgurians!!
item.dc:creator: ClumsyTomato

item.title: Images of Note: Clint in a sheep costume
item.description:
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
My Autism hole is gone now :(
Just to day, the stream has a piss meter
This is the worst aged words since "Peace in our time".
If you call yourself an Alpha or a Sigma, you're neither.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For jokes about Clint's sheep fetish: http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.title: Saturday wholesome dump of smile crepes (that's a kind of a tasty pancake)
item.description:
1. You just know they are made for each other : )
2. Pigeon boxing
3. Ruuuuun
4. Heckin cute
5. Look at this innovative way of catching stuff
7. True king
8
9. When the tickle hits the right spot
10. This guys is in some awesome films!
11
12
13
14
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: It's Meme Dump Day... again vol. 104
item.description:
Hello again friends. My phone is still yelling at me for being out of space. I need to transfer all my fantus videos off there I guess lol but until then I am dumping some of the thousands of memes I have saved.
hahahaha fuck.
I fuckin love grackles.
Yes please and thank you but I hope it's quality worldbuilding.
.
I'll see y'all there.
everything is gross. As a lifelong germaphobe I've just had to come to terms with that.
wtf cropping....sorry.
I unabashedly love comment sections. I look at all the replies.
Hahaha are we gonna make it to middle age?
It's @CodyBurkett
WOW these memes are old but still.
Yep.
.
Someone convince me not to make afternoon coffee.
boo
I aspire to someday write a book of poems half as good as Mary Oliver.
@fuegobpyre
Chronic pain life be like...
.
Every day its the goddamn kitchen.
hahaha @deafkitten
.
I see this in my future when my son goes to school this year.
I grew up with a mom with real bad undiagnosed ADHD and she hoards and my family's house was always a disaster and it was so embarrassing so now, though I too am an undiagnosed adhd whirlwind human, my house has to be fucking clean every time people come over so I drive myself nuts cleaning it then I still apologize for it being messy. Super fun.
.
.
No no, come back, that was pretty good.
Me during NaPoWriMo after the first week.
worth it.
.
.
Whelp
They are all puppies forever.
.
Me, every day.
You could put it that way. If inarticulate sounds count as guitar noises..?
.
Adore this. I think it's simple to find the beautiful things in people and focus on those, and beautiful souls shine through so clearly.
.
Thanks, void.
stoppp
The best.
There are a lot of days it has caterpillars or plants in it though.
.
.
.
I love spring, but fall forever.
FANTUS TAX. I posted a whooole pupdate of him earlier, if you'd like to see more puppy.
Hobbes tax :) Happy friday, friends.

item.title: "My friend and I are weird and send each other weird things" dump #92
item.description:
Howdy, weirdos!
'Tis silly goose spooky time.
Forever dead inside and on the ready to cheer my weirdo up.
I am ever so not sorry.
All four of them.
Side note: a sprained ankle doesn't heal nearly as fast as I thought. So I got me a kickass walking stick. I called him Ichabod Cane.
: ( ( ( (
My friendship with weirdo was an oopsie like that.
I found me a Narsil letter opener, it's the cutest thing ever!
You spelled "adopt" wrong, but otherwise yes.
*still waiting for the full gag reel*
Damn right he does!
#foreveryoung
Went adventuring with weirdo the last two days. Which means life's about to lol at me. Yay.
Murder, you murder, crow! Murder!
Tidier than most humans I've seen.
*goes off searching for Floki*
Ichabod Cane is wishing you lots of spookiness.
item.dc:creator: TheNephilim337
